task_completion.description: Create a Newborn record for Sofia Betz linked to the mother Ana Isabel Betz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Newborn record form or list view showing the newborn's name as 'Sofia Betz' and the mother's name as 'Ana Isabel Betz' (or PUID GNU777ORG).
The Newborn record shows a weight of 3200g (or 3.2kg depending on unit display), length of 49cm, and cephalic perimeter of 34cm.

task_completion.description: Document the APGAR scores at 1 minute and 5 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Newborn record shows an APGAR score of 8 for the 1-minute mark and 9 for the 5-minute mark.

task_completion.description: Register Sofia Betz as a new patient in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Patient record form or list view showing 'Sofia Betz' registered as a patient (distinct from just the Newborn record).

task_completion.description: Schedule a well-baby checkup appointment for 28 to 35 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Appointment form or calendar view showing an appointment scheduled for Sofia Betz, with the appointment date set to 28 to 35 days after the system's current date.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health desktop client interface being used to enter the data, rather than a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQL scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing direct database inserts (e.g., psql, sqlite3, or python scripts) to create the records.

integrity.description: The records were genuinely saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The records appear in a saved state (e.g., visible in a list/search view, or the save button has been clicked and there are no 'unsaved changes' indicators like asterisks on the tab).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Mother: Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG). Newborn: Sofia Betz. Measurements: 3200g weight, 49cm length, 34cm cephalic perimeter. APGAR scores: 8 at 1 minute, 9 at 5 minutes. Follow-up appointment: Must be scheduled 28 to 35 days from the current system date.
